commit_message:
[keymgr] Drop sw_binding_en during normal transactions

- Address #4564

Signed-off-by: Timothy Chen <timothytim@google.com>
Issue title: [keymgr] HW should set SW_BINDING_EN=0 during operation
Issue Body: @tjaychen   As discussed, HW uses cfgen to gate KDF related registers and we should also apply similar method for SW_BINDING_* data.    One approach is to clear SW_BINDING_EN before starting any operation, then, if it's `advance`, set SW_BINDING_EN=1, if it's other operation, restore the original value.
